message:
feat(flywheel): add per-tool accent colors and spectrum-colored particles

Rework the flywheel visualization component to replace the monochrome
green palette with unique per-tool accent colors and multi-hued effects:

- Define a 14-color accent map giving each tool (ntm, slb, mail, bv,
  ubs, cm, cass, acfs, dcg, ru, giil, xf, s2p, ms) its own vivid hue
- Lightning arcs now color-match the active/hovered tool instead of
  using a uniform green
- Neural fragment particles cycle through an 8-color spectrum (plasma
  blue, violet, hot pink, crimson, orange, amber, emerald, cyan)
- Glitch overlay, containment field header, telemetry grid, and detail
  panel all dynamically theme to the selected tool's accent color
- withAlpha() helper converts hex colors to rgba for opacity control
- Increase particle count from 12 to 18 with wider drift radius
- Slightly boost opacity on idle particles and active pulse rings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
